name: Golden Fruit and Nut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Line a greased 9-inch square pan with parchment paper.
3. In a large bowl, combine dates, almonds, dried apricots, and orange rind; set aside.
4. Melt butter in a heavy saucepan over low heat.
5. Stir in corn syrup and brown sugar. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the sugar is dissolved and the mixture comes to a full boil.
6. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
7. Gradually add the cereal and fruit-nut mixture, stirring until evenly coated.
8. Press the mixture firmly into the prepared pan.
9. Allow the bars to cool completely at room temperature.
10. Once cooled, cut into desired bar size (e.g., 16-24 bars).
Note: For an easier cutting process, refrigerate the bars for about 30 minutes before slicing.
Makes 16 to 24 bars
